---
name: Discussion or disagreement
about: Push back on existing advice, or open a broader conversation
title: "[discussion] "
labels: discussion
---

**What you're pushing back on**
Quote or link the section.

**Your counter-position**
What do you think instead, and why?

**What you've seen in practice**
The doc is opinionated on purpose. The opinions worth re-examining are the ones that broke for someone real. Tell us about that.
